Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.dialog

Class AdditiveLoadFileOrUrlChooser

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.dialog.AdditiveLoadFileOrUrlChooser
public class AdditiveLoadFileOrUrlChooser extends Object
This class aggregates a JFileChooser and additive load checkbox and URL entry components.

      Parameters:
      allowURL - Should a URL entry be allowed?
      allowText - Should a text entry be allowed?

      public boolean showDialog(Component parent)
      Show the file dialog.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      Whether the dialog was "approved".
